style_prefix: Hand-drawn anime illustration, Hayao Miyazaki film style,
style_suffix: soft painterly watercolor feel, warm natural lighting, gentle colors, peaceful nostalgic mood, clean line art, atmospheric depth, consistent hand-drawn anime style
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted, watermark, text, logo, photorealistic, 3d render, CGI, digital painting, cyberpunk, horror, neon, oversaturated, inconsistent style
ref_scene_prompt_suffix: Keep the same character face, hairstyle, and outfit as the reference image. Only change pose and background for this scene.
